Product features:

  • PADDED SEAT:The seat cushion features a soft, high-density sponge wrapped in premium breathable linen fabric. Designed for easy removal and cleaning, it offers a comfortable spot to sit while putting on or taking off your shoes. This entryway shoe bench brings both comfort and convenience to your daily routine.
  • Durable Faux Rattan Fronts: Made of high-quality PP rattan, the cabinet doors are smooth, burr-free, and safe for daily use—offering the natural look of woven rattan with greater durability and easy maintenance.
  • Dust-Proof Design: A solid panel is installed behind the rattan weave to effectively block dust and protect stored shoes, keeping your entryway clean and tidy.
  • Spacious Storage: The interior compartment is wide and roomy, providing ample space for organizing shoes, bags, or other essentials, making it ideal for busy households.
  • Removable Cushion Cover: The soft sponge seat cushion is topped with breathable linen fabric and features a removable cover, making cleaning and maintenance a breeze.
  • Comfortable & Functional: Designed to offer a convenient spot to sit while changing shoes, this bench combines functionality with style, perfect for entryways, mudrooms, or bedrooms.

Graphic description

PP Rattan Shoe Bench, Entryway Bench with Shoe Storage Wooden Shoe Rack Bench with Cushion Seat

Bring warmth and function to your entryway with this stylish rattan shoe bench. Crafted with smooth, burr-free PP rattan panels backed by solid boards for added dust protection, this bench offers both charm and practicality. The spacious interior keeps your footwear organized, while the soft, breathable linen cushion provides a comfortable seat for changing shoes. With a removable cushion cover for easy cleaning, this bench is a perfect blend of modern convenience and timeless design—ideal for your hallway, mudroom, or bedroom.
